selections.name: Midnight Still
selections.reason: Massive speed figure advantage (113) over this field. Inside post at Saratoga is a huge plus for early speed types.

selections.name: Johnny Hockey
selections.reason: Second highest speed figure in the race. Has shown tactical speed and gets Rosario in the irons.

selections.name: Decimation
selections.reason: Asmussen trainee who showed improvement last out. Can sit a stalking trip behind the heavy favorite.

selections.name: Motawaali
selections.reason: Mott trainee making second start. Should improve off the debut effort.

danger_horse.name: Harbaugh
danger_horse.reason: First-time starter for Casse with Jose Ortiz up. Works are solid enough to suggest early ability.

selections.name: Angel Of Kirk
selections.reason: Brad Cox first-time starter with Flavien Prat. Sire Yaupon hits at a high rate with debut runners.

selections.name: Aerial Affair
selections.reason: Flightline filly debuting for Antonucci. Outside draw is favorable for a clean break.

selections.name: Hot Fries
selections.reason: Asmussen firster with Santana. Bullet work on July 7th indicates readiness.

selections.name: Harpoon
selections.reason: Casse trainee by Cyberknife. Jose Ortiz takes the mount, suggesting intent.

danger_horse.name: Christopher Vedder
danger_horse.reason: Another Cox runner. Outside post and solid works make her a threat at a price.

selections.name: Speightful Lily
selections.reason: Top speed and class ratings in the field. Outside draw allows Prat to dictate the pace scenario.

selections.name: Next On Stage
selections.reason: Consistent runner for Linda Rice. Inside draw is a weapon if she breaks cleanly.

selections.name: Army Gal
selections.reason: Classy mare dropping slightly. Has the tactical speed to press the pace.

selections.name: Gridlock
selections.reason: Capable of closing into a hot pace. Fits well at this allowance optional claiming level.

danger_horse.name: Mischief Lady
danger_horse.reason: Has shown flashes of brilliance and could surprise if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Final Verdict
selections.reason: Highest raw speed figure in the field. Gaffalione can work out a perfect stalking trip from the inside.

selections.name: Life And Times
selections.reason: Pletcher/Ortiz combo. Consistent class ratings and tactical speed make him a major player.

selections.name: Ciao Chuck
selections.reason: Strong recent form and fits the class level perfectly. Outside post on the inner turf is the only concern.

selections.name: Sherlock's Jewel
selections.reason: McGaughey trainee with Rosario. Inside draw is a big advantage on the inner turf course.

danger_horse.name: Sounds Like A Plan
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and solid recent figures make him a wire-to-wire threat.

selections.name: In Our Time
selections.reason: Elite class rating and speed figures. Prat rides for Joseph; looks primed for a massive effort.

selections.name: Movin' On Up
selections.reason: Strong late kick and gets Gaffalione. Will benefit if the early pace is contested.

selections.name: Zeitlos
selections.reason: Asmussen trainee with Jose Ortiz. Rail draw in a turf sprint is tricky but has the class to overcome it.

selections.name: Sunna
selections.reason: Consistent runner who rarely runs a bad race. Rosario fits her riding style perfectly.

danger_horse.name: Obstreperous
danger_horse.reason: Could get loose on the lead and prove tough to catch at a price.

selections.name: Annotate
selections.reason: Asmussen runner drawing in from the AE list. Has actual race experience and solid figures compared to the FTS.

selections.name: Secret Connection
selections.reason: First-time starter for Englehart with Jose Ortiz. Works suggest she is ready to fire early.

selections.name: Rosapenna
selections.reason: Maker debut runner with Prat. Rail draw is an advantage if she breaks sharply.

selections.name: D'muehl
selections.reason: Brad Cox firster. Must be respected based on connections alone.

danger_horse.name: Uptown Rosie
danger_horse.reason: Joe Sharp trainee with Manuel Franco. Could surprise if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Walley World
selections.reason: Top speed figure in the field. Inside draw on the inner turf is a massive advantage.

selections.name: Unit Economics (gb)
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee with Prat. Classy European import who fits perfectly here.

selections.name: Candytown
selections.reason: Pletcher runner with tactical speed. Can stalk and pounce from the outside.

selections.name: Slapintheface
selections.reason: Consistent closer who will benefit from a contested pace.

danger_horse.name: Starship Titan
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and early speed make him a wire-to-wire threat.

selections.name: No Evidence
selections.reason: Highest speed figure in the field. Prat rides for Clement; outside draw is fine for a turf sprint.

selections.name: Cyclonite
selections.reason: Rail draw and strong early speed. Will be tough to catch if he gets loose.

selections.name: Gypsy Art
selections.reason: Wesley Ward runner with Dylan Davis. Always dangerous in turf sprints.

selections.name: Cuando
selections.reason: Solid class ratings and can sit a perfect stalking trip.

danger_horse.name: Bosun
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and Gaffalione make him a live longshot.

selections.name: Tricky Business
selections.reason: Top speed figure and class rating. Prat rides for Weaver; looks like a standout.

selections.name: King Farro
selections.reason: Strong recent form and tactical speed. Can press the pace and take over late.

selections.name: Judge Boushay
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee with Franco. Outside draw is a slight negative but has the class to overcome.

selections.name: Sunday Boy
selections.reason: Consistent runner who rarely misses the board. Good value for the bottom of exotics.

danger_horse.name: Toscano
danger_horse.reason: Gaffalione rides; could get a perfect trip sitting just off the leaders.

selections.name: Carson's Run
selections.reason: Elite class rating and top speed figures. Clement/Rosario combo is deadly in marathon turf races.

selections.name: Minaret Station
selections.reason: Strong late kick and gets Ortiz. Will be flying late if the pace is honest.

selections.name: Ole Crazy Bone
selections.reason: Rail draw saves ground for the entire 1 3/8 miles. Prat is a master at these marathon distances.

selections.name: Desvio
selections.reason: Consistent runner who can stalk and pounce. Good value underneath.

danger_horse.name: Fort George (gb)
danger_horse.reason: European import with class. Could outrun his odds if he handles the distance.

selections.name: Karsten
selections.reason: Top speed figure in the field. Prat rides for Abreu; looks ready to break his maiden.

selections.name: Before The Wind
selections.reason: Consistent runner with tactical speed. Should get a good trip from the middle of the pack.

selections.name: Manor Park
selections.reason: Gaffalione rides. Outside draw is a concern, but has the talent to overcome it.

selections.name: Classic Commander
selections.reason: Inside draw saves ground. Can hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Tizlawry
danger_horse.reason: Could show improvement in this spot; worth including in deeper exotics.
